name: Baseline (identity)
description: No changes applied — outputs must exactly match dataset expectedBaseline
expected: IDENTITY: all outputs must match expectedBaseline exactly

name: Pricing Lift (+5% Revenue)
expected: Revenue increases 5%, COGS recalculated on new revenue, burn decreases, runway extends

name: Demand Shock (-15% Revenue, months 1-3, revert)
description: Revenue drops 15% for first 3 months then reverts to baseline
expected: Temporary revenue drop M1-M3, full revert M4+, runway impact proportional to 3-month burn increase

name: Cost Optimization (GM +3pp, capped at 100%)
description: Gross margin improves by 3 percentage points (absolute), capped at 100%
expected: GM increases by 3pp (e.g. 8%->11%), COGS decreases, burn decreases. If GM was 100%, stays 100%

name: Hiring Wave (Payroll +10%)
expected: Total expenses increase, burn increases, runway decreases

name: Marketing Push (Opex +20%)
expected: Total expenses increase, burn increases, runway decreases

name: Cash Event (Cash -30%)
description: Cash balance drops 30% (simulate distribution, repayment, or unexpected cost)
expected: Runway decreases proportionally (30% less cash, same burn = 30% less runway)

name: Mixed Stack (S1+S4+S5 → then Reset)
description: Apply S1 (+5% rev) + S4 (+10% payroll) + S5 (+20% opex) simultaneously, verify combined effect, then reset and confirm exact baseline return
expected: Combined effect of all three changes. After reset, ALL values must return to exact baseline (identity test)
